title: Sourdough Sampling Plan: Low-Discrepancy Recipe Coverage
strategies: diagonal fill: place all free sample points on the main diagonal (baseline, high discrepancy ~0.1 ratio)
mediocre rank-1 lattice: spread free points with a coarse generator, modest improvement
Hammersley / van der Corput base-2 low-discrepancy set for the free points
optimize free points against the exact star-discrepancy objective (e.g. shifted lattices, Fibonacci/golden-ratio sets, local search)
